title: aster diffusus var. horizontalis
intro: Aster diffusus var. horizontalis, also known as White Aster or White Daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to have antimicrobial effects. The plant's medicinal properties are said to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Aster diffusus var. horizontalis can be prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to address a range of health concerns.
